title: Game Launch & Platform Initialization
use_cases: UC1: Launch Game on Desktop — DesktopPlayer triggers main(), SdlApplication created with SdlConfig (size, GL version negotiation, icon), DesktopLauncher constructed
UC2: Launch Game on Android — AndroidUser starts Activity; onCreate() initializes ClientLauncher inline, sets immersive mode, detects tablet scale, checks intent for file open
UC3: Launch Game on iOS — IOSUser triggers UIApplication.main(); createApplication() instantiates ClientLauncher inline with GL30, handles device orientation
UC4: Launch Headless Server — ServerOperator runs main(); HeadlessApplication wraps ServerLauncher, no graphics context
UC5: Initialize Core Client Systems — ClientLauncher.setup() bootstraps assets, atlas, mods, schematics, net, content, and adds Logic/Control/Renderer/UI/NetServer/NetClient modules
UC6: Load Assets Asynchronously — AssetManager loads sprites atlas, sounds, music, maps, content, schematics in background; LoadRenderer shows progress
UC7: Finalize Client Load — On asset completion: SoundPriority.init(), all module listeners init(), mods init(), ClientLoadEvent fired, finishLaunch() called
UC8: Initialize Steam Integration (Desktop) — DesktopLauncher loads SteamAPI, inits SNet/SStats/SWorkshop/SUser, sets GameService, handles lobby join from args
UC9: Initialize Discord RPC (Desktop) — DesktopLauncher connects DiscordRPC daemon thread; updateRPC() updates presence with game state
UC10: Handle File Drop / URL Open — Desktop: fileDropped() processes .msav files; iOS: openURL() handles URL open; Android: checkFiles(intent) handles intent URIs
UC11: Check System Requirements (Desktop) — check32Bit() and checkJavaVersion() validate OS and JVM before launch; show ErrorDialog if invalid
UC12: Configure GL Version (Desktop) — SdlConfig selects GL versions per platform: Intel GPU → GL2 only, macOS → GL4.1 max, others → GL4.6 down to GL2
UC13: Initialize Headless Server — ServerLauncher.init() sets config dir, loads settings, creates content, loads mods, adds Logic/NetServer/ServerControl listeners, fires ServerLoadEvent
UC14: Request File/Storage Permissions (Android) — Android ≥M requests WRITE/READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE; on grant, shows FileChooser
UC15: Show File Chooser — Desktop: native dialog via FileDialogs or zenity (Linux); Android: SAF Intent (API≥Q) or FileChooser; iOS: UIDocumentBrowserViewController
UC16: Handle Application Lifecycle (Mobile) — pause() calls finishLaunch() on mobile; resume() resumes only after finished; iOS handles orientation lock
key_relationships: AndroidLauncher creates anonymous ClientLauncher (inner subclass) via initialize()
IOSLauncher creates anonymous ClientLauncher (inner subclass) via new IOSApplication()
DesktopLauncher depends_on SdlApplication, SteamAPI, DiscordRPC, ArcNetProvider
AndroidLauncher depends_on AndroidApplication, DexClassLoader (mod loading), Android Intents
IOSLauncher depends_on IOSApplication.Delegate, RoboVM UIKit, NSFileCoordinator
ServerLauncher depends_on HeadlessApplication, ServerControl, Logic, NetServer
ClientLauncher depends_on AssetManager, Mods, Schematics, Net, Logic, Control, Renderer, UI, NetServer, NetClient

init_sequence_summary.desktop: main() → Version.init() → check32Bit/checkJavaVersion → SdlApplication(DesktopLauncher) → [optional: SteamAPI.init() + initSteam() | DiscordRPC.connect()] → ClientLauncher.init() → setup() → AssetManager loads → finishLaunch()
init_sequence_summary.android: onCreate() → super.onCreate() → initialize(ClientLauncher, AndroidAppConfig) → checkFiles(intent) → ClientLauncher.init() → setup() → AssetManager loads → finishLaunch()
init_sequence_summary.ios: main() → UIApplication.main() → createApplication() → IOSApplication(ClientLauncher) → didFinishLaunching → ClientLauncher.init() → setup() → AssetManager loads → finishLaunch()
init_sequence_summary.server: main() → Vars.platform = new Platform() → Vars.net = new Net() → HeadlessApplication(ServerLauncher) → ServerLauncher.init() → content/mods/logic init → ServerLoadEvent

important_notes: ClientLauncher is abstract; Android and iOS instantiate it as anonymous inner classes overriding platform-specific methods (showFileChooser, loadJar, shareFile, etc.)
ServerLauncher does NOT extend ClientLauncher — it is a completely separate headless path (no graphics, no UI, no assets)
GL version negotiation happens only on Desktop at SdlConfig construction time
Steam integration is gated by Version.isSteam flag; Discord RPC by absence of 'nodiscord' system property
Asset loading is asynchronous (20 FPS polling loop); the game is 'finished' only after all assets complete
Mobile platforms call finishLaunch() on pause (not just exit) for reliability
Android 14+ requires read-only jar files for mod loading (DexClassLoader security change)
FPS cap logic (default 120, uncapped on iOS) is in ClientLauncher.update()
